robot_instruction.target_location_description: white melamine panel positioned on sliding carriage, aligned against fence guide, being fed through rotating saw blade

hazards_detected.description: saw blade cutting panel generates chips and dust without visible extraction
rotating blade exposed during cutting operation
table saw operation generates high noise levels

scene_context.free_text_notes: Active panel saw cutting operation in progress. Operator feeding white melamine panel through sliding table saw. Hand proximity to blade is concerning - push stick should be used. Background shows stacked panel materials and second operator. Workshop appears to be production furniture manufacturing facility with multiple panel sizing operations.

Operator is manually feeding a white laminated panel into a precision panel sizing machine. The panel appears to be MDF with white laminate finish. Red safety handle visible on right side of machine suggests emergency stop capability. Green mesh conveyor belt visible on left side will transport panel through cutting mechanism. Machine appears to be an industrial panel saw or beam saw for precision furniture panel sizing.

robot_instruction.target_location_description: align panel edge flush against aluminum fence guide, centered on conveyor belt for saw infeed

hazards_detected.description: conveyor belt and rollers present pinch hazard at infeed
panel edges and saw blade area ahead
panel saw operation generates high noise levels

scene_context.free_text_notes: Operator manually positioning white laminate panel on precision panel saw infeed conveyor. Two red push sticks visible on right side of machine for safe panel feeding. Panel appears to be approximately 500x500mm white melamine or laminate faced MDF. Machine has aluminum extrusion fence system for precise alignment. Conveyor belt is green mesh type for grip. Only operator's right hand and forearm visible wearing red/pink long sleeve.

Operator is manually positioning a white melamine panel on a precision panel sizing saw (beam saw). The panel appears to be fed from left side with cut strip visible on outfeed. Industrial setting with natural light from windows. Orange safety guards visible on machine. This is a typical panel sizing operation in furniture/cabinet manufacturing where large sheets are cut to precise dimensions.

Operator is actively feeding a white melamine-coated panel through a panel saw using proper push stick technique. The panel is being guided against an aluminum fence for precision sizing. Red long-sleeve shirt visible on operator arms. Green textured material visible on left side of saw table may be anti-slip mat or waste material. Machine appears to be industrial sliding table panel saw typical of furniture manufacturing.
